:root {
  --volcanic: #212121;
  --marble: #fafafa;
  --green: #39594d;
  --coral: #ff7759;
  --coral-light: rgb(255 173 155);
  --z-index: 99 !important;
  font-family: InterRegular, Arial, ui-serif, Georgia, Cambria, Times New Roman,
    Times, serif;
}
.cky-overlay {
  z-index: 101 !important;
}

.cky-consent-container,
.cky-preference-center,
.cky-consent-bar {
  z-index: var(--z-index);
}
.cky-box-bottom-right {
  width: 500px;
  right: 24px;
  bottom: 24px;
}
.cky-modal {
  z-index: 102;
}

/* cookieYes Branding */
.cky-prefrence-btn-wrapper + div,
.cky-notice .cky-title {
  display: none !important;
}

.cky-notice-des {
  overflow: auto;
  margin-bottom: 32px;
  padding-right: 40px;
}
.cky-notice-des p,
.cky-notice-des a {
  font-size: 12px;
  line-height: 140%;
}

.cky-notice-des a {
  color: #212121;
  text-decoration: underline;
}

/* Pop-up modal */
.cky-preference-center {
  border-radius: 8px;
}
.cky-box-bottom-right,
.cky-modal.cky-modal-open {
  transition-property: all;
  transition-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
  transition-duration: 150ms;
}
/* Accept, manage and save pref button wrappers */
.cky-footer-wrapper .cky-opt-out-btn-wrapper {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row-reverse;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  width: 386px;
gap:16px;
}

/* Initial pop-up */
.cky-consent-container .cky-consent-bar {
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 24px;
  font-size: 14px;
}

.cky-notice-des {
  overflow: auto;
  margin-bottom: 32px;
}

/* General btn */
.cky-btn {
  text-align: center;
  margin: 0 !important;
  padding: 0;
  transition: all ease-in-out 0.15s;
  position: relative;
  font-size: 14px;
  flex: none;
  gap: 8px;
}
.cky-btn:focus {
}

/* Accept btn */
.cky-btn-accept,
.cky-btn-preferences,
.cky-btn-confirm {
  padding: 8px 24px 12px 24px;
  border-radius: 32px;
  flex: none !important;
}

.cky-opt-out-btn-wrapper .cky-btn-cancel {
  border: none;
  border-bottom: 1px solid;
  border-radius: 0px;
  flex: none;
}

/* Manage Modal Accordions */
.cky-accordion-btn {
  font-size: 18px;
}
.cky-accordion {
  border-color: var(--volcanic);
}
.cky-show-desc-btn {
  color: #ff7759 !important;
  font-weight: bold;
}
.cky-always-active {
  color: var(--green) !important;
}

@media only screen and (max-width: 576px) {
  .cky-prefrence-btn-wrapper {
    flex-direction: row-reverse !important;
    gap: 16px;
  }
  .cky-box-bottom-right {
    bottom: 0px !important;
  }
}
@media only screen and (max-width: 540px) {
  .cky-box-bottom-right {
    max-width: 100%;
  }
  .cky-consent-container .cky-consent-bar {
    padding: 20px;
  }
  .cky-consent-container {
    font-size: 14px;
    right: 0px;
  }
  .cky-opt-out-btn-wrapper {
    margin-top: 20px;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 16px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: flex-end !important;
    width: 386px;
  }

  .cky-prefrence-btn-wrapper {
    margin-top: 20px;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 16px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column !important;
    justify-content: flex-start;
    width: auto;
  }
  .cky-prefrence-btn-wrapper .cky-btn-accept,
  .cky-prefrence-btn-wrapper .cky-btn-preferences {
  }
  .cky-btn-accept,
  .cky-btn-preferences {
  }

  .cky-btn,
  .cky-prefrence-btn-wrapper .cky-btn {
    width: auto;
  }

  .cky-notice-des {
    padding: 0px;
    padding-right: 30px;
  }
}

.cky-notice-btn-wrapper .cky-btn-reject {
  display: none;
}
.cky-prefrence-btn-wrapper .cky-btn-accept {
  display: none;
}
.cky-consent-container :lang(ko),
.cky-preference-center :lang(ko),
.cky-modal :lang(ko) {
  font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Malgun Gothic", "맑은 고딕",
    Helvetica, "Apple SD Gothic Neo", sans-serif;
}

.cky-consent-container :lang(ja),
.cky-preference-center :lang(ja),
.cky-modal :lang(ja) {
  font-family: Meiryo, "Hiragino Kaku Gothic ProN", "MS PGothic", sans-serif;
}

.cky-consent-container :lang(ar),
.cky-preference-center :lang(ar),
.cky-modal :lang(ar) {
  font-family: "Noto Sans Arabic", sans-serif;
}
.cky-opt-out-checkbox-label {
  color: #ffffff !important;
  font-size: 0px !important;
  position: relative;
  line-height: unset !important;
}
.cky-opt-out-checkbox-label::after {
  content: "Accept only necessary cookies";
  color: #2e2e2e !important;
  font-size: 16px;
  font-weight: 700;
  cursor: pointer;
  word-break: break-word;
  line-height: unset !important;
}

.cky-notice-btn-wrapper {
  align-items: start;
  padding-left: 0;
}
.cky-banner-btn-close,
.cky-btn-close {
  top: 20px !important;
  rightt: 20px !important;
}
.cky-banner-btn-close > img {
  height: 16px !important;
  width: 16px !important;
}
.cky-btn-close > img {
  height: 16px !important;
  width: 16px !important;
